title: [XML Emit] fix instance names of nodes under named begin blocks (#4129)

features.name: named_begin_block_with_module_instance
features.description: Code should include a named begin block with a module instance declared within it

features.name: nested_named_begin_with_instance_and_assign
features.description: Code should include a named begin block nested within another generate construct, containing both an assign statement and a module instance
